memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: despot = des（主人）+ pot（力量）→ 掌握绝对权力的主人 → 暴君

coreMeaning.en: of or like a despot; tyrannical

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: despotic = despot（暴君）+ -ic → 暴君的、专横的
despotically = despotic + -ally → 专横地
despotism = despot（暴君）+ -ism → 暴政制度
despotisms = despotism 的复数形式
despots = despot 的复数
desquamate = de-（去除）+ squam（鳞片）+ -ate → 去除鳞片 → 脱皮

coreMeaning.en: sweet course served at end of meal
removal of what has been served

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: dessert（甜点）vs desert（沙漠）—— 甜点有两个s，因为你总想要两份
desserts = dessert 的复数

coreMeaning.en: a spoon used for eating dessert

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: dessertspoon = dessert（甜点）+ spoon（勺子）→ 吃甜点的勺子
dessertspoonful = dessertspoon + -ful → 一甜点匙的量
dessertspoonfuls = dessertspoonful 的复数
dessertspoons = dessertspoon 的复数

coreMeaning.en: the action of making something unstable

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: destabilization = de-（去除）+ stabil（稳定）+ -ization → 破坏稳定的行为
destabilize = de-（去除）+ stable（稳定）+ -ize → 使不稳定

coreMeaning.en: the place to which someone is going

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: destination = destine（注定）+ -ation → 命中注定的终点 → 目的地
destinations = destination 的复数

coreMeaning.en: to appoint or determine the future of

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: destine = de（完全）+ stin（固定/站立）→ 被固定好的 → 命中注定

coreMeaning.en: certain to do or be something in the future

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: destined = destine（命定）+ -d → 已被命定的
destines = destine 的第三人称单数
destinies = destiny 的复数
destining = destine 的现在分词

coreMeaning.en: the events that will happen to a person; fate

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: destiny = de（完全）+ stin（固定）+ -y → 已被固定好的未来 → 命运

coreMeaning.en: without the basic necessities of life; extremely poor

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: destitute = de-（去除）+ stitute（设置/给予）→ 被剥夺了一切 → 贫困

coreMeaning.en: extreme poverty; complete lack of means

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: destitution = destitute（贫困的）+ -ion → 贫困的状态

coreMeaning.cn: 战马（中世纪骑士的战马）

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: destrier 源自古法语，骑士用右手牵的战马（dexter=右手）

coreMeaning.en: to damage something so badly that it no longer exists

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: destroy = de-（去除/相反）+ stroy（建造/struct）→ 反向建造 → 毁灭
destroyed = destroy 的过去式/过去分词

coreMeaning.en: one that destroys; a type of fast warship

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: destroyer = destroy（毁灭）+ -er → 毁灭者；也指驱逐舰
destroyers = destroyer 的复数
destroying = destroy 的现在分词
destroys = destroy 的第三人称单数
destruct = de-（反）+ struct（建造）→ 反建造 → 自毁
destructibility = destructible（可破坏的）+ -ity → 可破坏性
destructible = destruct（破坏）+ -ible → 可被破坏的

coreMeaning.en: the action of causing great damage or harm

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: destruction = de-（反）+ struct（建造）+ -ion → 反建造的行为 → 毁灭
destructive = destruct（破坏）+ -ive → 具有破坏性的
destructively = destructive + -ly → 以破坏性方式地
destructiveness = destructive + -ness → 破坏性的程度

coreMeaning.en: a device for destroying; in computing, a destructor function

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: destructor = destruct（破坏）+ -or → 破坏装置；编程中的析构函数

coreMeaning.cn: 析构器（复数）；自炸装置（复数）

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: destructors = destructor 的复数，编程中多个析构器

coreMeaning.en: the state of no longer being used or practiced

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: desuetude = de-（去除）+ suetu（习惯）→ 失去习惯/使用 → 废止

coreMeaning.en: in a desultory manner; without purpose

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: desultorily = desultory + -ily → 漫无目的地到处跳跃 → 散漫地

coreMeaning.cn: 断断续续的；散漫的；漫无目的的
coreMeaning.en: lacking plan, purpose, or enthusiasm; jumping from one thing to another

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: desultory = de（离开）+ sult（跳跃，cf. saltation）+ -ory → 跳来跳去、漫无目的的

coreMeaning.en: present participle of desynchronize; making asynchronous

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: desynchronizing = de-（去除）+ synchronize（同步）+ -ing → 正在使不同步

coreMeaning.en: to separate or remove something from something else

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: detach = de-（去除/相反）+ tach（附着，cf. attach）→ 取消附着 → 分离
detachable = detach（分离）+ -able → 可被分离的

coreMeaning.cn: 分开的；超然的；客观冷静的

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: detached = detach（分离）+ -ed → 已分离的；引申为超然的、客观的
detaches = detach 的第三人称单数
detaching = detach 的现在分词
